title: Re:Avaritia IO
description: This MOD is an unofficial one that has Reforged everything in Avaritia IO.
body:
# Re:Avaritia IO

This mod is an **unofficial port of Avaritia IO**.  
It is an addon for **Avaritia** and **EnderIO**, newly recreated from scratch and built specifically for **NeoForge 1.21.1**.  
It adds **all content from Avaritia IO**, including:

\- **Infinity Capacitor**  
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/sDFhxbG.png)![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/yJuZSSo.png)

\- **Neutronium Grinding Ball**  
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/FURkoDW.png) ![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/XCotrKn.png)

\- **Infinity Grinding Ball**  
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/VcKyYqH.png) ![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/Vkvw1Wd.png)

## Official Download

*   [Avaritia IO](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/avaritia-io) by [tfarecnim](https://www.curseforge.com/members/tfarecnim/projects)

## Dependencies

This mod requires different dependencies depending on which Avaritia version you intend to use.

### **Using Neo Avaritia IO**

If you want to use **AvaritiaNeo**, install:

*   [AvaritiaNeo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/avaritianeo)
*   [Ender IO](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ender-io)

### **Using Re Avaritia IO**

If you want to use **Re:Avaritia**, install:

*   [Re:Avaritia](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/re-avaritia)
*   [Ender IO](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ender-io)
